title: helleria livida
intro: Helleria livida, also known as the green or yellow hound's tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Helleria livida include reducing fever, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats. Helleria livida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
